//: The factory dogfoods its own agentic loop (plan 008 F2/F3/F4). The kb-writer and reflection plugins ship these same hooks to consuming projects via the catalog; sessions in THIS repo don't install the plugins, so this wires them directly: KB index surfaced at session start (and after /clear or compaction), reflection nudge when a gate run goes red, lesson-capture prompt on stop. All three self-gate and stay silent when they have nothing to add. Hook cwd is the project root, so paths are repo-relative.

hooks.prompt: Before stopping: did this session produce a durable lesson, pattern, gotcha, or decision worth keeping? If so, first check it isn't already captured with `bun run kb:search`, then add it to the project knowledge base (use the curating-knowledge skill or `bun run kb:add`; update or supersede an existing entry with `bun run kb:curate` instead of duplicating it). If nothing durable emerged, or the lesson is already captured, stop silently — do not narrate this check.
